name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: Delaying the inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Governor McCrory continues to try to undermine the results of an election he lost. This is just another -- and hopefully his last -- attempt.
Governor McCrory continues to try to undermine the results of an election he lost. This is just another -- and hopefully his last -- attempt.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b57/2fde7c66/43a29a47/15692d0e/396373466/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorysboe?utm_campaign=fnd_sboe_rec&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161201_fnd_gq_sboe_ful_rec_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Last night, the Republican-controlled State Board of Elections ordered a partial recount in Durham County. Governor McCrory continues to try to undermine the results of an election he lost. This is just another -- and hopefully his last -- attempt. **It's time for Governor McCrory to stop these efforts to delay the inevitable and accept the results of the election. Chip in today to help us protect this win:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b57/2fde7c66/43a29a47/15692d01/396373466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorysboe?utm_campaign=fnd_sboe_rec&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161201_fnd_gq_sboe_ful_rec_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

It's important that you know -- we are confident that no matter how many delays, the results of this race will not change. Roy Cooper is the next governor of North Carolina. In fact, our lead grew over 10,000 votes yesterday.
Governor McCrory has no path to victory.
**[Chip in now to help us protect our victory.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b57/2fde7c66/43a29a47/15692d0e/396373466/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorysboe?utm_campaign=fnd_sboe_rec&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161201_fnd_gq_sboe_ful_rec_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

Trey Nix

Cooper for North Carolina

name: Donna Brazile
subject: It's OK to get mad, but...
body:
We're counting on Democrats to keep fighting Democrats
---
**Standing up to Trump and the GOP starts right now. Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce6/3661916072/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**
Friend --

Every time I read another headline about how Donald Trump is mixing his personal profit margins with his transition, or hear about another one of his Cabinet hires who spans the range from unqualified to offensive, or read one of his late-night tweetstorms -- I get outraged.

But you know what? Outrage is good. It's OK to get mad when our next president disrespects his office, our values, or the Constitution.

What we cannot do, though, is give up. We can't lose hope. Donald Trump will be a catastrophically dangerous president if left to his own devices. It's up to us -- Democrats like you and me -- to keep holding his feet to the fire.

I'm ready to do my part. If I can count on you, chip in $3 or more today.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce7/3661916072/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce4/3661916072/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce5/3661916072/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce2/3661916072/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce3/3661916072/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce0/3661916072/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd")**

** Thank you,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071ce1/3661916072/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071cee/3661916072/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071cef/3661916072/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c36a/4067b0a/2252292db/7e071cec/3661916072/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161201_db2_nd&source=em_20161201_db2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

But you know what? Outrage is good. It's OK to get mad when our next president disrespects his office, our values, or the Constitution. What we cannot do, though, is give up. We can't lose hope. name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Save the Date—Inauguration
body:
Peter,

Our team is hard at work preparing to hit the ground running on January 9th when we officially take office. I wanted to take a moment today to make sure that you [save that date](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=36c3b94bb5&e=84041254e6) so you can join us for our [inaugural ceremonies.](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=68f14e7db4&e=84041254e6) You can get the details on those events and sign up for inauguration updates at our new website [NewMissouri.org](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=ed5866a8a6&e=84041254e6).

Be on the lookout for details on events around the state throughout inauguration week. We'll be participating in service events, holding prayer services, and honoring some of Missouri's greatest heroes. It's all a part of our inaugural theme: The Heart of Missouri.

Sheena and I would be honored to have you join our family and Missouri's other constitutional officers to [celebrate ](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=ab12fbed25&e=84041254e6)[The Heart of Missouri](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=0779c1c99e&e=84041254e6) and the start of our mission to take Missouri in a new direction.

Yours in Service,
Eric Greitens
A Committee for a New Missouri, Inc
PO Box #1422
Jefferson City, Missouri 65102
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=1ebc30a852&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=92a3b8bf10&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=7b99129bca), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@newmissouri.org](mailto:team@newmissouri.org). You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=191301fbb9&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Now - more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Over the next few days -- let's prove what we've got here in Washington.

Friend -- You know what? It's time to get to work.

This wasn't the email I thought I'd be writing -- just like these weren't the election results we wanted.

We saw a man who built his campaign on bigotry, racism and sexism -- on harnessing the fears that divide us -- win this election. I've heard from many of you who feel mad. I've heard from many of you who feel scared. And I've heard from many of you committing to being part of the fight for our future and recognizing that we have so much at stake for Washington state and our country.

We have a responsibility to act.

So here in Washington, we're going to prove that our way beats Trump's way, every time. We're going to prove it with our words, and more importantly we're going to prove it with our actions. We will finish the job of funding our public education system, lead on climate action and give every Washingtonian a path towards economic stability -- even those newest to our country.

We've got a real fight ahead of us, and that makes what we do in Washington state all the more crucial. So with our state's legislative session about to start, I need your help right now to prove our political power.

Together we are going to continue building a progressive movement behind our values -- a movement that will propel our vision of prosperity for all forward day by day, month by month, and year by year.

I'm counting on you to help me do it -- not because we have an election tomorrow, but because building this movement matters for the long term. It matters especially before this legislative session, especially before redistricting and before the next big race.

At midnight on Friday December 9, we hit a state mandated fundraising freeze. Chip in today to help me raise $20,200 and keep our progressive movement moving forward during the four month fundraising freeze!

Let's build the progressive movement we need to stop Trump together -- chip in $50 today before our legally mandated fundraising freeze.

LINK: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTk3NTY1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA2MDExODA0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Now more than ever, places like Washington state must prove to our country our movement is worth so much more than Donald Trump's hateful politics. We must show we win by bringing people together, by passing progressives policies, and by building stronger, safer communities of our welcoming spirit.

This isn't the result I thought we'd be talking about, but it's where we are now -- so I'm going to keep up the fight. How about you?

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTk3NTY1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA2MDExODA0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9975655&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA2MDExODA0MAS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com.

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

Privacy Policy http://jayinslee.com/privacy

Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
